visuals.title: Types of System Calls Overview
visuals.description: Diagram showing the six categories of system calls with representative examples for each category

diagrams.title: System Call Categories
steps: Process Control: fork, exec, exit, wait, abort
File Management: open, close, read, write, lseek
Device Management: request, release, read, write, ioctl
Information Maintenance: getpid, time, sleep, uname
Communication: pipe, shmget, socket, send, recv
diagrams.notes: Each category corresponds to a fundamental OS service. UNIX treats devices as files, so file and device system calls overlap significantly.
